---
title: 'What is my mission... do I know?'
date: '2024-09-18T20:41:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Musing'
---

Pondering the future... while watching this video `<a href="https://youtu.be/zglDZqfHPo4?si=iYXpdJs6u7ffgGKn" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Marketing Expert Reveals Secret For Building an Audience That Buys | Seth Godin</a>`, Seth said (~paraphrase) "what is your mission... what is the minimum audience to support your mission?"<div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /><div><br /></div><div>
